text_block_list.text:
I wonder if it's because I've been working too hard lately but—— 
Even after finishing all my work, I haven't been able to sleep well……

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Hey, that's really unbecoming of you! That said…… 
Are you still not getting much sleep? Looks like 
the soap and bath bombs I prepared didn't work……
choice_data_list: I thought it was a good idea though……

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: Yeah……Maybe we should try a different approach?

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
If we don't do something, you'll collapse eventually. 
Let's try a few other things!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Okay——Next, some stretches while resetting fatigue. Lie 
down on your back and then bend your body like it's a bow—— 
Just like that, focus on stretching your upper body.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
After stretching, let's try some Yoga to create a sense 
of balance in the autonomic nervous system. Lie down, 
and we'll start with some poses for joint health.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Bend your knees, move as if you're going to sit 
cross-legged but place the soles of your feet together——

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
And lastly, some porridge full of sleep-inducing 
vitamins. 『Tryptophan』 in the rice, and 『Vitamin B6』 in 
the chicken help produce hormones that help with sleep.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Let's warm up that body from the inside 
to help you feel sleepy. Now, eat up♪

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: You've gotta be kidding me, none of it worked!?

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
When I tried it out, it worked so well for me though……! 
Did we skimp too much on something?
choice_data_list: ……I'll just handle it on my own

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: ……I absolutely refuse!!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Since I've already decided, then I need to do it! 
Until you're sound asleep, I won't give up……!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
And that's why—— 
We'll start counting sheep, or at least I will!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
There is some basis for it though? A steady rhythm 
can give the brain a sense of security, and repeatedly 
hearing the same words can make you sleepy.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
——Come on, lay down! A trainer that can't sleep, 
and me that wants to get my trainer to sleep——Let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: 1 sheep……2 sheep……3 sheep……4 sheep——

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
(First, get them to relax……and then 
after that……yeah……looks like it's working……)

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
(Just take a nice, deep breath, Trainer…… ……Breathe in…… 
Breathe out——breathe in……breathe out——Yeah, just like that)

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: 151 sheep……152 sheep……153 sheep……154 sheep——

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
(Ah……you opened your eyes……? Just by closing your eyes, 
you'll start to feel more rested, you know?……Right, just like that)

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: 645 sheep……646 sheep……647 sheep……648 sheep——

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
(Trainer……so you still can't sleep, can you……? 
Fine, bring it on……I'll stay with you until the end)

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
1151 sheep……hey, Trainer……? If you're having this much trouble 
sleeping, maybe it's not physical……maybe it's some kind of mental block?

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Yeah……like the stress might have been slowly building up and making 
it difficult to sleep……something like that might be possible.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
It's okay though, Trainer……It's fine to fall asleep…… 
Rest assured……I'll stay by your side……

『It's fine to fall asleep』 rather than 『You have to sleep』—— 
For some reason, that felt like the words I always wanted to hear.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
——1199 sheep……1200 sheep…… 
Huh……? Did you fall asleep?

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
——I see……Fufuu. 
……I guess that means it's my win♪

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Though……I still really wonder why you're having trouble sleeping. 
It did seem like they were up to something last week though——Hm?

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Training menu revisions, 15 versions? Even results from the VR Umalator—— 
Eh? They installed my data and tried it themself……!?

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
You mentioned before that you couldn't come 
up with a good menu——Does that mean this is……?

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
……Fufuu, geez. 
You really don't want to lose to yourself do you?

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: ——Good work. ……Good night.
